Status.RootsTip: ROM folders: Green = configured, Gray = missing

Status.ReadyTip: Overall status: Green = ready, Yellow = warning, Red = blocked
Start.FlowDesc: Recommended path: preview first, confirm second, move only after review.
Progress.CancelHint: Cancel stops the run safely; already executed actions remain visible in the log.
Sort.PresetSafeDryRunTip: Safe preview: Check only, don't move files
Sort.ModeSimpleTip: Simplified view: only the 4 most important options (Alt+I)
Sort.RegionTip: Preferred region: ROMs from this region are preferred for duplicates.
Sort.ActionDedupTip: Detects ROMs with the same game name and keeps only the best version (region, format, revision).
Sort.ActionJunkTip: Moves demos, betas, prototypes, hacks and homebrew to the trash folder.
Sort.ActionSortTip: Automatically sorts ROMs into subfolders by detected console (e.g. SNES, PS1, GBA).
Sort.HintWorkflow: Add folders above, then click 'Start sorting' below.
Sort.BtnAddTip: Add a new ROM folder to the list
Sort.OptionDryRunTip: No files will be moved; analysis + report only.
Sort.OptionConvertTip: Enables format conversion in move run.
Sort.ConflictTip: How to handle file name collisions when moving.
Sort.BannerDryRun: DryRun active: No files will be moved.
Sort.BtnStartMoveTip: Restart the run in move mode.
Sort.TipAdvanced: Tip: Find advanced options in the 'Settings' tab.
Sort.RegionInfo: Enabled regions are preferred when deduplicating.
Sort.SimpleTip: Simplified view: only the 4 most important options (Alt+I)
Sort.ExpertTip: Show all configuration options (regions, filters, conversion) (Alt+E)
Sort.ActionDupesTip: Detects ROMs with the same game name and keeps only the best version (region, format, revision).
Sort.SimpleHint: Add folders above, then click 'Start sorting' below.
Sort.AddRootTip: Add a new ROM folder to the list
Sort.DryRunOptionTip: No files will be moved; analysis + report only.
Sort.ConvertOptionTip: Enables format conversion in move run.
Sort.DryRunBanner: Preview active: No files have been moved yet.
Sort.StartMoveTip: Restart the run in move mode.
Sort.OptionsTip: Tip: Find advanced options in the 'Settings' tab.
Sort.RegionPriorityDesc: Enabled regions are preferred when deduplicating.
Result.SummaryReady: Preview completed. Ready to clean up.
Result.ReportPreviewHelp: Shows the generated HTML report as a preview.
Result.TrustSignal: ✔ Fully reversible — undo available at any time
Tools.LockedTip: Locked – start a preview or run in the Start tab
Tools.PinTip: Pin or unpin tool from quick access
Tools.Maturity.Production.Desc: Production-ready with a real execution path and regression coverage.
Tools.Maturity.Guided.Desc: Fully usable, but intentionally positioned as a guided review or utility workflow.
Tools.Maturity.Experimental.Desc: Usable, but not yet at production depth or polish.
Tools.Requirement.RunResult: Requires a current preview or run result.
Tools.Requirement.Host: Not available in the current host.
Tools.LockedAction: Start a quick preview or preview in the Start tab to unlock all analysis and export tools.
Tools.SectionRecommendedDesc: Context-aware tools for the current collection state and the latest run.
Tools.SectionQuickAccessDesc: Your pinned tools. Keep only the actions you actually use often.
Tools.SectionRecentDesc: Tools that were truly used in this session.
Tools.NoRecommended: There are no useful tool suggestions right now. Configure roots or run a preview to unlock contextual recommendations.
Tools.NoRecent: No tool has been launched in this session yet.
Tools.StartRecommendedDesc: These tools match the current workflow state and should not stay hidden in the catalog.
Tools.ConversionRegistryDesc: Reference view of the loaded format rules from `conversion-registry.json`. This replaces the former specialist tab and keeps the registry visible inside the main catalog.
Tools.ConversionRegistryEmpty: No conversion rules are loaded. Check `conversion-registry.json` and the data paths.
Tools.ExternalToolsDesc: Configure paths to external programs that Romulus needs for conversion and extraction.
Tools.ExternalToolsInfo: These tools are required for format conversion (CHD, RVZ, CSO) and archive operations. Use 'Auto-detect' to find installed tools in PATH and common directories.
Tools.Recommend.SetupDat: Check DAT sources and local packs before the next run.
Tools.Recommend.ConversionPlan: Review target formats and priorities before conversion.
Tools.Recommend.ConversionCheck: Validate converted artifacts and projected savings.
Tools.Recommend.Collection: Merge multiple sources safely instead of copying manually.
Tools.Recommend.Workflow: Fast entry into useful tools without hunting through the catalog.
Tools.Recommend.Setup: Preparation tool for the next production run.
Tools.Recommend.RunInsight: Directly relevant to the latest result and its KPI/export follow-up.
Tools.Recommend.DedupeReview: Inspect winner/loser decisions in more detail.
Tools.Recommend.DatGaps: Work through DAT gaps and missing coverage after the run.
Tools.Recommend.DatCoverage: Check DAT completeness and coverage after the run.
Tools.Recommend.Recovery: Rollback and integrity tools for safe follow-up.
Settings.AggressiveJunk: Filter obvious junk files more aggressively
Settings.LabelFileTypes: File types (no selection = scan all file types):
Settings.ConsoleSearchTip: Filter consoles by name or abbreviation
Settings.AutoDetectTip: Searches for known conversion tools on the system
Settings.DatPerfNote: ℹ DAT + CRC increase accuracy but may significantly slow down the run.
Settings.ProfilesInfo: Profiles save all settings and can be switched between different collections.
Settings.LocaleTip: Currently only English fully supported. More languages planned.
Settings.SortConsoleTip: Folders are structured by console (e.g. SNES, PS1)
Settings.AggressiveJunkTip: Detects more junk files such as demos, betas, homebrew
Settings.AliasKeyingTip: Related editions are grouped under a single GameKey
Settings.KeepUnknownWhenOnlyGames: Keep unknown files for manual review
Settings.OnlyGamesTip: Filters out likely non-game content across all platforms
Settings.KeepUnknownWhenOnlyGamesTip: When enabled, files with uncertain classification stay in the result for safety
Settings.SafetyStrictTip: Enables all safety checks and requires confirmation before deletions
Settings.ProtectedPathsTip: Paths that must not be moved or deleted
Settings.JpKeepSelectedTip: Japan-exclusive titles are kept even without Japan as a preferred region
Settings.JpKeepConsolesTip: Consoles for which Japan-exclusive titles are kept
Settings.UseDatTip: Compares files against DAT database entries (hashes).
Settings.EnableDatAuditTip: Writes DAT status and matches into the run result and reports.
Settings.EnableDatRenameTip: Renames files to the DAT canonical name during move runs when verification is unambiguous.
Settings.DatFallbackTip: If no exact match is found, try alternative DAT mapping.
Settings.CrcVerifyTip: Basic CRC check at file level (independent of DAT).
Settings.DatMappingDesc: Manually assign consoles to their DAT files. Without mapping, auto-detection is used.
Settings.DatMappingAutoDetectTip: Scans the DAT folder and automatically maps detected DAT files to consoles.
Settings.ProfileShareTip: Copy profile as JSON to clipboard
Settings.CliCommandCopyTip: Copy current run as CLI command to clipboard
Settings.TrashTip: Directory where duplicates are moved to (_TRASH)
Settings.GameKeyPreviewDesc: Checks the current GameKey normalization against a sample title. This keeps the core diagnostic visible without a separate lab tab.
Dialog.CrashLogSaved: Details have been saved to crash.log.

Wizard.Title: First-Run Setup
Wizard.Step1Desc: Select one or more folders containing your ROM collection.

Wizard.TrustHint: No files will be modified – a preview is created first. You stay in full control.

Safety.Desc: Files blocked, flagged for review, or classified as unknown by the sort gate.

Conversion.EmptyHint: conversion-registry.json could not be found or loaded.
Empty.RunPreviewHint: Run a preview with F5 to see results.
Empty.NoReportHint: Run a preview (F5) to generate the report.
Run.MoveApplyGate.Unlocked: Apply changes is unlocked: This configuration has already been previewed.
Run.MoveApplyGate.LockedNoPrev: Apply changes is locked: Run a preview for the current configuration first.
Run.MoveApplyGate.LockedChanged: Apply changes is locked: Configuration has changed since the last preview. Please re-run the preview.
Result.Summary.PreviewDone: Preview complete: {0} duplicates and {1} junk files detected.
Result.Summary.PreviewShortcutHint: Apply directly with Ctrl+M or use the red action area.
Result.Summary.CancelledPartial: Run cancelled. Partial results may still be visible.
Result.Summary.CancelledInPhaseMoved: Run cancelled in phase {0}. Already moved: {1} files. {2}
Result.Summary.Failed: Run failed. Check log and error summary for details.
Result.Summary.CompletedWithErrors: Run completed with errors. Check error summary for details.
Result.Summary.Cancelled: Cancel requested. Already processed partial results remain visible.
Result.Context.Preview: Preview result: These numbers show planned changes. Nothing has been moved yet.
Result.Context.CancelledPartial: Cancelled: KPIs are based on partial data and may be incomplete.
Result.Context.CancelledNoData: Cancelled before usable results: no reliable KPIs available.
Result.Context.ConvertOnly: Conversion mode active: dedupe/move KPIs are not applicable; focus is conversion output.
Result.Context.MoveCompleted: Cleanup completed: KPIs reflect the executed result.
Result.InlineConfirmWaiting: Safety wait active: "Run now" unlocks shortly.
Dialog.ConfirmMove.Warning: This action moves files to the trash folder and can only be undone via rollback.
